items.title: Appealing Nicotine Ruling Contradicts Health Minister’s Previous Anti-Vape Position — MPS
items.summary: The decision to appeal the High Court's ruling on nicotine is difficult to reconcile with the government’s previous positions. The health minister had stated publicly that a vape ban was a matter of time and committed to stronger measures against vaping. The post Appealing Nicotine Ruling Contradicts Health Minister’s Previous Anti-Vape Position — MPS appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Government Sending Mixed Signals By Appealing Nicotine Ruling — MCTC
items.summary: MCTC respects the government’s legal right to appeal the nicotine ruling. However, the government’s decision to appeal sends a mixed signal when viewed against previous public commitments to strengthen vape control and reduce nicotine addiction. The post Government Sending Mixed Signals By Appealing Nicotine Ruling — MCTC appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Who Is MOH Protecting By Appealing Nicotine Ruling? — MyWatch
items.summary: MyWatch said the government’s appeal of the High Court ruling on liquid nicotine creates the perception that vape industry interests are being prioritised over children’s health. The group urged Putrajaya to withdraw the appeal and pursue a nationwide vape ban. The post Who Is MOH Protecting By Appealing Nicotine Ruling? — MyWatch appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Government Can’t Claim Vape Ban Goal While Appealing Nicotine Ruling: Galen Centre
items.summary: The Galen Centre says Putrajaya cannot claim to be simultaneously moving toward a vape ban while appealing the High Court ruling on nicotine, as the think tank stands in solidarity with health care professionals in MOH who must be dismayed with the appeal. The post Government Can’t Claim Vape Ban Goal While Appealing Nicotine Ruling: Galen Centre appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Pandemic Time Bomb: Why Ebola, H5N1, Nipah, And Hantavirus Are Warning Us Now — Assoc Prof Dr Vinod Balasubramaniam
items.summary: Preparedness is often criticised as expensive until an outbreak escapes; then it becomes the cheapest investment the world failed to make. The post The Pandemic Time Bomb: Why Ebola, H5N1, Nipah, And Hantavirus Are Warning Us Now — Assoc Prof Dr Vinod Balasubramaniam appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.summary: The goal of zero dengue deaths is achievable, but only if we have the strategy and solidarity to act. The post Observing Asean Dengue Day — Dr Zulkifli Ismail, Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Koh Kar Chai appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Withdraw Appeal Against High Court Ruling On Nicotine — Dr Halimah Ali
items.summary: The government must withdraw this appeal, undertake a comprehensive review of the nation’s vaping policy, and consider a total ban on vape products in order to protect Malaysian children from nicotine addiction and drug abuse. The post Withdraw Appeal Against High Court Ruling On Nicotine — Dr Halimah Ali appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Back Of The Thigh, Front Of The Problem: The Injury That Can Sideline Athletes
items.summary: From weekend games to competitive football, hamstring injuries can affect everyday athletes and recreational players in ways that may need assessment, imaging or specialist care. The post Back Of The Thigh, Front Of The Problem: The Injury That Can Sideline Athletes appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Health Minister, Government Appeal ‘Entire’ Nicotine Case Ruling
items.summary: Health Minister Dr Dzul and the government are appealing the entirety of a High Court verdict that nullified the delisting of liquid nicotine because they're "dissatisfied" with the ruling, says the AGC in a June 12 notice of appeal to the Court of Appeal. The post Health Minister, Government Appeal ‘Entire’ Nicotine Case Ruling appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Chronic Diseases Require Modern Insurance Solutions — Dr K. Thiruchelvam
items.summary: A recent survey by the Psoriasis Association of Malaysia highlights structural gaps between existing insurance products and the realities of chronic disease care. The post Chronic Diseases Require Modern Insurance Solutions — Dr K. Thiruchelvam appeared first on CodeBlue .
